Overview

O West Business District is a commercial office development by Orascom in 6th of October City, Egypt, designed in accordance with ECP 203. I was responsible for the complete structural design workflow of multiple office building types, from concept development to final delivery, including structural analysis, reinforced concrete design, Revit BIM modeling, and multidisciplinary coordination. The project involved a variety of building configurations, requiring efficient, coordinated, and code-compliant structural solutions across different structural layouts.
